name: Levi's Leather Wallet Gift Set
description: A premium Levi's leather bifold wallet beautifully packed in an iconic Levi's gift box. A classic, timeless gift for the man who deserves the best.

name: FOMO Purple Accessories Kit
description: A gorgeous purple accessories collection — bangles, press-on nails, floral hair clips, fluffy scrunchie, and more. Perfect for the girl who loves everything pretty.

name: Woodland Leather Belt
description: A rich brown genuine leather belt by Woodland with a sturdy buckle. Stylish, durable, and perfect for both casual and formal wear.

name: Tommy Hilfiger Wallet Gift Set
description: An iconic Tommy Hilfiger suede bifold wallet in a premium wooden gift box, accompanied by a sleek guitar-shaped metal desk decor. A gift that says you know his style.

name: Versace Premium Leather Wallet
description: A luxurious Versace pebbled leather bifold wallet with the iconic Medusa embossing, presented in a premium branded gift box. For the man with impeccable taste.

name: Puma Premium Men's Wallet
description: A sleek navy blue Puma leather wallet packed in a sporty Puma gift box. The perfect gift for the active, style-conscious man.

name: FOMO Her Hamper
description: Our signature FOMO hamper for her — earrings, scrunchie, bangles, press-on nails, pom-pom keychain, and more. All packed with love in our beautiful FOMO gift box. She'll absolutely love it.

name: FOMO Her Hamper Deluxe
description: The deluxe version of our bestselling FOMO Her Hamper — packed with even more goodies: earrings, scrunchie, bangles, nail art, charm keychain, fairy lights, and a personalised 'Our Moments' card.

name: Premium Gift Hamper for Him
description: A curated premium hamper for him — Louis Philippe socks, Woodland belt, KitKat chocolates, and a face sheet mask, all elegantly packed. Perfect for birthdays, Eid, or any special occasion.

name: Ultimate Gift Hamper for Him
description: Our most loved men's hamper — Tommy Hilfiger wallet, Louis Philippe socks, Woodland belt, Lacto Calamine face mask, KitKat chocolates, a cute teddy, and fairy lights. A complete package of love.

name: FOMO Love Hamper for Her
description: A beautifully styled FOMO gift hamper for her — jhumki earrings, fluffy scrunchie, purple bangles, press-on nails, pom-pom keychain, and a 'You Make Me Happy' greeting card. Packed with love.

name: Pink Accessories Gift Set
description: A sweet pink accessories set — a delicate moon & star charm bracelet, floral hair clips, and a fluffy pink scrunchie. Ideal for gifting the girl who loves all things pink.

name: Personalised Family Photo Frame
description: A beautiful personalised wooden photo frame with space for 3 photos and a custom message engraved. The perfect keepsake for any family.

name: Family Game Night Set
description: A curated set of 5 classic board games in a beautiful box. Perfect for family bonding and fun evenings together.

name: Premium Festive Hamper
description: A luxurious festive hamper filled with dry fruits, chocolates, and goodies. Spread the joy with your whole family!

name: Kids Deluxe Art Kit
description: A colourful art kit with 100+ pieces including crayons, watercolours, sketch pens, and stencils. Let creativity bloom!

name: Giant Soft Teddy Bear
description: An ultra-soft, huggable teddy bear that kids will love. Made with child-safe materials and super fluffy.

name: Handmade Soy Candle Set
description: Set of 3 handcrafted soy candles in calming scents — lavender, vanilla, and sandalwood. Made with love in India.

name: Boho Macramé Wall Hanging
description: A beautiful handcrafted macramé wall hanging in natural cotton. Adds a bohemian charm to any room.

name: Premium Chocolate Gift Box
description: A gorgeous box of 16 assorted premium chocolates — dark, milk, and white. Because chocolate makes everything better.
